en: If you are a sole owner, the same information should be indicated: Format 8-1-2 digits
Please enter your enterprise Tax Id number (adószám) or your individual Tax ID number (adóazonosító jel).
cégjegyzékszám / nyilvántartási szám - format is 2-2-6 digit (XX-XX-XXXXXX)

Please provide your company registry number.
If you are a sole owner, please indicate your registration number.
Does your company have a EU (VIES) Tax ID number (EU VAT)? (If you are a sole owner, the same information should be indicated.)
Please provide your company’s EU (VIES) Tax ID number.
Please indicate the full name, registered seat (additionally site, branch, if any) and website (if any) of your company. (If you are a sole owner, the same information should be indicated.)
Please indicate the main business activity (with the relevant NACE code) of your company as per the company register.
Please indicate if you opted for the special small taxpayer regime.
Please name the person authorized to represent the company officially (signatory officer).
